chapter_title.ar: باب فَضْلِ يَوْمِ الْجُمُعَةِ وَ لَيْلَتِهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 66 – Merits of the day of Friday and its night

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/343)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/343)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) السَّاعَةُ الَّتِي فِي يَوْمِ الْجُمُعَةِ الَّتِي لَا يَدْعُو فِيهَا مُؤْمِنٌ إِلَّا اسْتُجِيبَ لَهُ قَالَ نَعَمْ إِذَا خَرَجَ الْإِمَامُ قُلْتُ إِنَّ الْإِمَامَ يُعَجِّلُ وَ يُؤَخِّرُ قَالَ إِذَا زَاغَتِ الشَّمْسُ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Abu Nasr, from Muawiya Bin Ammar who said,

‘I said to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, ‘The timing during the day of Friday in which a Believer would not supplicate except that it would be Answered for him’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Yes, when the prayer leader comes out’. I said, ‘The prayer leader tends to be early and delayed’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘When the sun turns (after midday)’.
en.sarwar: 12. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn abu Nasr from Mu‘awiyah ibn ‘Ammar who has said the following: “I asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the hour on Friday in which prayer of a believing person is answered. He replied, ‘Yes, it is the time when the Imam comes out.’ I then said, ‘Imam may come early or late.’ He said, ‘It is when the sun declines toward the west at midday.’”
